title: Better Mimic
description: Adds terrifying mimics that disguise as chests, sneak up on players, and drop valuable loot when defeated!
body:
# Better Mimic

**Beware the chest!** Not all treasure is what it seems...

## 🎭 Features

### Perfect Disguise
- Mimics look **exactly** like chests — same model, same size, same rotation
- Spawn naturally in the world or use spawn eggs
- Completely invisible until disturbed

### Two Behaviors
- **Aggressive Mimics** 🔴 — Sneak up on players when they're not looking
- **Passive Mimics** 🟢 — Harmless until you try to open them

### Dynamic Combat
- Leap attacks with smooth animations
- Tongue attack with particle effects
- Intelligent AI that tracks player line of sight
- No fall damage — they're built for jumping!

### Loot System
- Collects nearby items while disguised
- Drops stolen loot when killed
- Bonus drops: wood planks, bones, iron, gold, emeralds, diamonds

### Polished Experience
- Smooth animation transitions
- Block-aligned positioning
- Sound effects for opening, closing, attacking
- Particle effects on landing

## 📦 Installation

1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/)
2. Download [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
3. Drop `bettermimic-1.0.0.jar` into your mods folder
4. Launch Minecraft 1.20.1

### Tips
- Don't trust every chest!
- Aggressive mimics move when you're not looking
- They can't be pushed or knocked back
- High armor and knockback resistance
- Watch for subtle "breathing" animations

## ⚙️ Stats

- **Health:** 15 hearts (30 HP)
- **Damage:** 1.5 hearts (3.0)
- **Armor:** 4.0
- **Knockback Resistance:** 80%
- **XP Drop:** 10-15

## 🔧 Technical

- **Minecraft:** 1.20.1
- **Mod Loader:** Fabric
- **Dependencies:** Fabric API
- **Client/Server:** Both required
